company_summary: Precisely is a 50+ year enterprise data integrity company serving 12,000 companies across 100 countries, focused on delivering accurate, consistent, and contextual data for confident business decisions. Their current strategic direction is 'Agentic-Ready Data' — positioning their Data Integrity Suite as the trusted data foundation that enterprise AI and agentic workflows run on. They are actively partnering with Matillion, Snowflake, Databricks, and AWS to accelerate data modernization and AI readiness.
fit_indicators: Precisely's core strategic push is 'Agentic-Ready Data' for enterprise AI workflows — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, directly aligned with their current product direction

Precisely emphasizes legacy modernization and connecting 'today's infrastructure with tomorrow's technology' — Sudheer has 4 years of legacy modernization experience at RNTBCI migrating enterprise Java systems to microservices

Precisely partners heavily with SAP and IBM enterprise platforms — Sudheer's enterprise Java background at RNTBCI involved large-scale internal tooling across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi operations, the same industrial enterprise context
Role signals include process automation and data self-service tooling — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval internal tools used daily across a multi-brand automotive enterprise org

Precisely's 2026 report theme is 'AI confidence is high but AI readiness tells a different story' — Sudheer's MBA focus on AI product and his hands-on multi-agent systems work positions him to bridge the gap between AI ambition and enterprise data readiness

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager or Director of Product — AI/Data Integrity Suite
contact_targets.reason: Directly manages or works alongside the role Sudheer is targeting; best person to speak to about AI product direction and where a Technical PM or AI Product hire fits

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager or Principal Engineer — Data Platform or Agentic AI
contact_targets.reason: Senior IC doing the technical work most aligned with Sudheer's background in enterprise Java systems and multi-agent AI; can validate fit and provide internal referral signal

contact_targets.title: Technical Recruiter or Talent Partner — Product and Engineering
contact_targets.reason: Fallback if no product/engineering contacts are reachable; can route Sudheer to the right hiring manager for AI product or Technical PM openings
